name: roles/viewer
stage: GA
title: Viewer

========================================================
Task 3. View the grantable roles on resources
========================================================


👉  Grantable roles from Project qwiklabs-gcp-02-2c7f3f0eb987:

---
description: Access to edit and deploy an action
name: roles/actions.Admin
title: Actions Admin
---
description: Access to view an action
name: roles/actions.Viewer
title: Actions Viewer
---
description: Grants Agent Gateway Service Agent permissions required to do DNS peering.
name: roles/agentgateway.serviceAgent
title: Agent Gateway Service Agent
---
description: Grants AI Edge Portal Service Agent permissions required to read/write
  data to GCS buckets
name: roles/aiedgeportal.serviceAgent
title: AI Edge Portal Service Agent
---
description: Vertex AI Service Agent used to access Agent Sandbox managed resources
  in consumer project with restricted permissions.
name: roles/aiplatform.agentSandboxServiceAgent
title: Vertex AI Agent Sandbox Service Agent
---
description: Vertex AI Batch Prediction Service Agent for serving batch prediction
  requests.
name: roles/aiplatform.batchPredictionServiceAgent
title: Vertex AI Batch Prediction Service Agent
---
description: Gives Vertex AI Colab the proper permissions to function.
name: roles/aiplatform.colabServiceAgent
title: Vertex AI Colab Service Agent
---
description: Gives Vertex AI Custom Code the proper permissions. The aiplatform.customJobs.create
  IAM permission is highly privileged. Through Vertex AI Custom Training jobs, it
  effectively grants editor-level access to other services activated for the consumer
  project, such as GCS and BigQuery.
name: roles/aiplatform.customCodeServiceAgent
title: Vertex AI Custom Code Service Agent
---
description: Grants admin access to Agent Platform Express.
name: roles/aiplatform.expressAdmin
title: Agent Platform Express Admin
---
description: Grants user access to Agent Platform Express.
name: roles/aiplatform.expressUser
title: Agent Platform Express User
---
description: Gives Vertex AI Extension that executes custom code the permissions it
  needs to function.
name: roles/aiplatform.extensionCustomCodeServiceAgent
title: Vertex AI Extension Custom Code Service Agent
---
description: Gives Vertex AI Extension the permissions it needs to function.
name: roles/aiplatform.extensionServiceAgent
title: Vertex AI Extension Service Agent
---
description: Deprecated. Use featurestoreAdmin instead.
name: roles/aiplatform.featurestoreUser
